category: Concurrent Execution using Shared Resource with Improper Synchronization (Race Condition)
description: Changing an ERC20 allowance from value `X` to `Y` with a single `approve` call allows a spender to front-run and spend `X` before the change, then spend `Y` after, effectively double-spending. Integrations that do not use `increaseAllowance`/`decreaseAllowance` are exposed.
name: ERC20 Approval Double-Spend (Allowance Race)
remediation: - Follow the allowance reset pattern: set allowance to `0`, then set the new value. - Prefer `increaseAllowance`/`decreaseAllowance` or EIP-2612 `permit` with nonces. - For critical flows, pull tokens via `transferFrom` after verifying allowance updates.
